title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Bank International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Bank International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the ICICI Bank International Enterprises family as a Risk Analyst in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ICICI Bank International Enterprises:
ICICI Bank International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank International Enterprises!
